waveRule: wave 1 = admin auth + audit log + schema-only foundation; wave 2 = read/monitor resources (need the wave 1 guards and, where noted, the wave 1 tables); wave 3 = write/action resources (need the wave 1 guards AND the audit-log write hook). Regression baseline (Phase 4.5 suite from protected-registry.json) must be green before wave 1 and after every wave.

resources.name: AdminAuth
resources.notes: AdminUser + admin_refresh_tokens tables, AdminJwtGuard/AdminRolesGuard, login/refresh/me/change-password, superadmin seed command, cross-rejection contract tests both directions.

resources.name: AdminAuditLog
resources.notes: admin_audit_log table + append-only audit hook (used by every wave 3 resource) + the two read endpoints behind the AdminAuth guards.

resources.name: AdminSchemaFoundation
resources.notes: Schema-only: usage_events, otp_request_log, otp_test_codes, webhook_event_log tables + additive Business.isTest/enterpriseBands/suspendedAt (+ optional RefreshToken.revokedReason). Additive Prisma migration; gate = migration runs clean on a copy of the current schema and the live app still compiles/boots. No endpoints.

resources.name: AdminOverview
resources.notes: Aggregates + union-view activity feed over existing tables only.

resources.name: AdminBusinessesView
resources.notes: Reads the new isTest/suspendedAt/enterpriseBands columns and usage_events (credit-usage breakdown, empty-safe).

resources.name: AdminPlansView
resources.notes: Admin-scoped plan catalog read.

resources.name: AdminDebtsView
resources.notes: Cross-tenant debts, stats, payments feed over existing tables.

resources.name: AdminRemindersView
resources.notes: Reminder reads + usage_events cost fields (empty-safe); sms-cost-series reads usage_events only.

resources.name: AdminBillingView
resources.notes: Superadmin-only reads; iap-lifecycle reads webhook_event_log (empty-safe) + Subscription sweep.

resources.name: AdminCreditsView
resources.notes: Ledger-derived totals wire day one; burnByType from usage_events (empty-safe); config endpoint exposes live constants.

resources.name: AdminPayLinksView
resources.notes: Payment-derived fee splits (formula-authoritative); webhook events read over webhook_event_log (empty-safe).

resources.name: AdminPayoutsView
resources.notes: Server-side NUBAN masking; settlement fields honest-null per partial-honest-empty ruling.

resources.name: AdminAuthMonitorView
resources.notes: otp_request_log reads (empty-safe), test-numbers list (isTest column), gap-1 sessions panel over RefreshToken (read-only).

resources.name: AdminAiUsageView
resources.notes: usage_events voiceParse/insight reads, metadata-only recent parses (empty-safe).

resources.name: AdminSyncHealthView
resources.notes: gap-4 tombstone coverage + documented payment hard-delete limitation; read-only over existing tables.

resources.name: AdminUserManagement
resources.notes: List/create-with-temp-password/disable/enable/delete; self-disable refused server-side; every write audit-logged.

resources.name: AdminBusinessActions
resources.notes: test-flag, grant-credits, force-plan (Subscription lockstep), enterprise-bands (+derived bvumCeilingOverride), reset-test (isTest-fenced), suspend/unsuspend (gap-5). Returns AdminBusinessesView DTOs, hence the view dependency.

resources.name: AdminReminderActions
resources.notes: Cross-tenant retry via existing RemindersService semantics; support-allowed; audit-logged; returns AdminReminderView.

resources.name: AdminWebhookActions
resources.notes: Replay of error-outcome webhook_event_log rows through existing WebhooksService processing; support-allowed; audit-logged. Functionally inert until webhook instrumentation populates error rows, but buildable and contract-testable with seeded log rows.

resources.name: AdminOtpReveal
resources.notes: Superadmin reveal from otp_test_codes with structural server-side isTest join; every reveal audit-logged. Empty side table until instrumentation lands; contract tests seed rows directly.

outsideWaves.instrumentationTask: The 11 instrumentation entries in admin-registry.json write to PROTECTED files (reminders.service, reminder-dispatch.service, voice.service, auth.service, webhooks.service) and are NOT part of any admin wave: they run as a separate owner-gated fenced maintenance task (like the 2026-07-21 pass) with the full isolated contract suite and a protected-registry re-freeze. All wave 2 readers are contractually empty-safe until it lands.
outsideWaves.suspensionEnforcement: followup-suspension-enforcement (debts.service change) is owner-ruled work outside this pipeline.
